name: Caramel Corn
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine popcorn and almonds in a large microwave-safe bowl.
2. In a 4-cup microwave-safe measuring cup, combine brown sugar, margarine (or butter), corn syrup, and salt.
3. Microwave on HIGH for 2 minutes; stir.
4. Microwave on HIGH for 2-3 more minutes or until the mixture comes to a rolling boil.
5. Stir in baking soda; pour over popcorn and almonds.
6. Mix well; microwave on HIGH for 2 minutes.
7. Spread on foil or wax paper to cool.
